name: prunerr
description: Media library cleanup tool for Plex/Sonarr/Radarr

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:ci: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test:ci --workspace=client
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules server/dist client/dist
